description: An observatory's pointing model must be rebuilt after the primary mirror was removed for recoating. Using the maintenance specification at ~/Documents/pointing_calibration_spec.txt, capture 5-second LIGHT frame exposures for the 8 reference stars (Polaris, Capella, Regulus, Arcturus, Vega, Altair, Deneb, Fomalhaut). Each star's image must be saved to /home/ga/Images/pointing_model/<star_name_lowercase>/. Generate a TPoint-format pointing model input file at /home/ga/Documents/pointing_model.dat containing coordinates for all 8 stars. Capture a final sky view to ~/Images/pointing_model/final_sky.png using the script ~/capture_sky_view.sh. The telescope must be unparked to perform observations. Note: ignore any stale FITS files from previous runs.
